text.message: You know what’s coming if you solo again lol
If u wanna throw again cuz I made a judgement call block be my guest
I’m not gonna start it. But if you sell again, I will retaliate
Now stop typing and put your settlement down
Btw saying touch grass then immediately playing a computer game is hilarious
It’s a saying for come back to reality cuz you were a little too into the game
I don’t even get the joke
Are you gonna compete for port oj?
If u don’t let him get it he’ll probably just throw judging off personal experience lolll
You threw the last game, don’t get it twisted lol
You did tho, let’s not forget that lol
Tough to remember who started throwing first. Also tough to tell who’s still holding a grudge and robbing the other every time and who’s just playing the game
If throwing = making a judgement call on who was in better position and blocking them then guilty
Did you make a bad call. Sure
But at least you’re honest with yourself
U love my position huh? I’m honored lol
Not complaining just noticing. He is the one that hates solos lol just using his own logic
You moved it from someone who was in the lead
You never understood at all lol
I thought u were in better position
And you’ve robbed me every single time across two games since then
Even when I wasn’t winning in this one
Red you simply don’t understand. He’s solo blocked me every time across two straight games even when I’ve had two points
Oj has 2 devs he's not playing
Becuase in one game I robbed him
I solo you after you sold
And you’re crying about it even now
I can see you are bad
Jenni it’s not personal I just think ur in a better position with the production u get and port
Who has all the vps lol
Green u must have mad vps
Red u got gg or u need a roll
